intro: Telis procumbens, also known as Telis procumbens, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic properties.
